---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Main Website
      href: https://conair94.github.io
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/conair94
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/

---

Welcome to my personal and academic blog. Here you can find:

- **Academic Work**: Insights and findings from my ongoing research and studies.
- **Synaptic Static**: A series of music reviews exploring different genres and styles.
- **Random Thoughts**: A space for reflections on various topics.

For more information about my professional background and projects, please visit my main website at [conair94.github.io](https://conair94.github.io).
